entities.name: NITRIFICATION INHIBITORS
entities.description: Substances that slow the biological oxidation of ammonia to nitrate to improve nitrogen use efficiency and reduce environmental impact

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing crops and livestock for food and other products

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL POLLUTION
entities.description: The contamination of the environment, often caused by nitrogen leaching or greenhouse gas emissions

entities.name: INDIGENOUS RESOURCES
entities.description: Local biological or chemical materials used as sources for identifying new inhibitors

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL GROUPS
entities.description: Specific groups of atoms within molecules that are responsible for retarding the nitrification process

entities.name: NITRIFICATION
entities.description: The biological process of converting ammonia to nitrite and then to nitrate

entities.name: IDENTIFICATION AND EVALUATION
entities.description: The systematic approach used to find and test the effectiveness of nitrification inhibitors
